entity.summary: Wallet-connected decentralized exchange application offering token swaps, liquidity management, bridging, rewards, and related trading and launch surfaces.
entity.notes: Current first-party application exposes Swap, Liquidity, Bridge, Trade, Reward, Launcher, and wallet-connect functionality. Exchange identity is additionally corroborated by the June 2026 exchange candidate corpus; public protocol documentation is limited, so confidence remains medium.

evidence.title: Gull Network swap application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application exposes wallet-connected token swapping, slippage settings, token selection, trading navigation, liquidity, bridge, reward, and launcher surfaces.

evidence.title: Gull Network liquidity application
evidence.notes: Current first-party liquidity surface provides wallet-connected liquidity-position management and add-liquidity functionality.

evidence.title: Gull Network exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Exchange candidate corpus independently identifies Gull Network under the app.gullnetwork.com domain, corroborating the live first-party DEX application.
